recommended_action: Run first, then rerun source-validation and source-contracts.
required_environment: Network-enabled local machine or GitHub runner with outbound HTTPS.
title: Run hardened curl/wget source download plan
unblock_condition: MBS/PBS/CMS source hosts resolve and downloads complete into ignored data/raw_live storage.

recommended_action: Commit only derived rows and redacted provenance after licence review.
required_environment: Local checkout with downloaded MBS item-map and descriptor TXT files.
title: Create reviewed derived-only MBS TXT pair bundle
unblock_condition: Both July 2026 MBS TXT files exist in ignored local raw storage.

recommended_action: Avoid CPT descriptor redistribution; publish payment/metadata only when permitted.
required_environment: Human review of AMA/CPT licence implications before parsing or publishing fields.
title: Review CMS CLFS AMA-gated file and derived-field policy
unblock_condition: Reviewer approves the set of derived CLFS fields that can be stored and published.

recommended_action: Make this a required release gate in CI before public release.
required_environment: Network-enabled Python environment with access to PyPI advisory APIs.
title: Run pip-audit strict in a network-enabled environment
unblock_condition: PyPI advisory lookup completes with no unresolved vulnerabilities.

recommended_action: Keep all third-party Actions SHA-pinned and zizmor medium findings blocking.
required_environment: Network-enabled environment with GitHub API access.
title: Resolve GitHub Action tags to immutable SHAs
unblock_condition: All action references are resolved and workflows use immutable SHAs where practical.

recommended_action: The dry run has passed; inspect the candidate bundle and publish only after the remaining review gates are approved.
required_environment: GitHub Actions with configured HF_TOKEN, HF_DATASET_REPO and HF_SPACE_REPO targets, plus licence and evidence review.
title: Publish gated Hugging Face dataset and Space dry run
unblock_condition: Licence, evidence, policy and research gates pass and publication is explicitly approved.

recommended_action: The private project and token-gated plan are configured; keep upload fail-closed until the reviewed preregistration decision is recorded.
required_environment: Configured OSF personal access token and private project, plus approved protocol text.
title: Create OSF protocol/report components and upload preregistration pack
unblock_condition: Protocols, licence, methods and governance decisions are human-reviewed and the sync manifest rows are explicitly approved.

recommended_action: Run the check before any upload or amendment; treat drift as a new review decision rather than overwriting the registered state.
required_environment: Approved protocol freeze, human methods/licence/governance review and an exported OSF registration metadata snapshot.
title: Verify OSF registration fingerprint and amendment state
unblock_condition: The reviewed freeze is approved, an active OSF registration snapshot is exported, and protocol/manifest fingerprints match without mutation.

command: PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/make_mapping_blind_review_ledger.py --cycle expansion_v9 && PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/make_mapping_adjudication_packet.py --cycle expansion_v9
recommended_action: Preserve prior cycles as immutable evidence. Complete expansion_v9 under its bounded codebook; do not disclose or evaluate its holdout early.
required_environment: Two isolated blinded reviews and accountable adjudication of the separately frozen expansion cycle.
title: Adjudicate mapping gold standards and negative controls
unblock_condition: The expansion cycle fills the approved family/label quotas, accountable adjudication is frozen, and the untouched holdout is evaluated exactly once.

command: pixi run historical-sources && pixi run source-download-plan && pixi run source-contracts
recommended_action: Continue derived-only processing under the approved source-specific licences. The inventory covers 343 targets across 32 pages; missing payloads remain an acquisition gap and must not be inferred as temporal evidence.
required_environment: Human source/licence review plus network access to historical MBS and PBS releases.
title: Review historical MBS/PBS source expansion and licence scope
unblock_condition: Acquire and validate the approved historical release payloads into ignored raw storage; the metadata inventory and source-specific reuse policy are complete.

recommended_action: Use the 11-route, 64-test, four-project browser packet as the pre-review gate; complete scoped VoiceOver, visual and provenance review without claiming universal WCAG conformance.
required_environment: Human visual review across the supported browser/OS matrix with approved baselines.
title: Review cross-platform dashboard visual baselines
unblock_condition: Reviewed screenshots or platform-specific baselines are approved without accessibility, layout or provenance regressions.

command: PYTHONPATH=src reimbursement-atlas release-readiness && PYTHONPATH=src reimbursement-atlas data-quality
recommended_action: Only then cut a signed, attested public release and archive to Zenodo/OSF.
required_environment: Network-enabled runner after source/security/publication gates complete.
title: Generate final release-readiness report and public archive
unblock_condition: Required software blockers are zero and repository_release_ready is true. Research, evidence and policy-claim readiness remain separate fail-closed gates.
